## What & why
<!-- Briefly describe the change and the motivation. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] A failing test was written first, then made to pass (TDD).
- [ ] `pytest -m "not integration and not e2e"` is green locally.
- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/usage changed (README / PRODUCT / CHANGELOG).
- [ ] No secrets committed; `.env` is not tracked.
- [ ] Respects the **Markdown-canonical** and **structure-first / RAG-optional** invariants.

<!-- Anything that needs special attention. -->
